error.cache_error.message: Cache processing failed. Please try again later.
error.coordinate_format.suggestion: Please enter valid longitude and latitude coordinates. Longitude must be between -180 and 180, and latitude between -90 and 90.
error.export_failed.suggestion: An error occurred while generating the file. Please make sure the interpolation task has finished and try again.
error.file_too_large.suggestion: Uploaded files cannot exceed 50MB. Please compress the data or upload it in batches.
error.geojson_format.suggestion: Please make sure the file is in standard GeoJSON format and contains the type and features fields.
error.geolocation.user_denied: The user denied the location request
error.geolocation_failed.suggestion: Please check whether GPS is enabled on your device, or try again outdoors.
error.grid-resolution: Grid resolution must be a positive integer between 1 and 10000
error.insufficient_points.suggestion: Kriging interpolation requires at least 3 sampling points. Please continue adding sampling data.
error.interpolation_failed.suggestion: The sampling point distribution may be unsuitable or the parameter settings may be incorrect. Try adjusting the variogram model or grid resolution.
error.invalid_polygon.suggestion: Only Polygon or MultiPolygon types are supported. Please check the GeoJSON geometry type.
error.network_error.suggestion: Please check your network connection and whether the backend service is running properly.
error.not_found.message: The requested resource does not exist
error.permission_denied.suggestion: Please allow this site to access location information in your browser settings, then refresh the page and try again.
error.plugin_error.message: Plugin execution failed. Please try again later.
error.point_out_of_bounds.message: Sampling point is out of bounds
error.point_out_of_bounds.suggestion: Please make sure the sampling point is within the defined area boundary, or switch to free sampling mode.
error.server_error.suggestion: The server encountered an error while processing the request. Please try again later. If the problem persists, contact the administrator.
error.solution.check_network: Check the network connection and try again
error.solution.check_resource_path: Please confirm that the resource path or ID is correct
error.solution.clear_cache: Please clear the cache and try again
error.solution.disable_plugin: Please disable the related plugin first and try again
error.solution.relogin: Please sign in again and try again
error.solution.request_permission: Please contact the administrator to request access
error.timeout_error.suggestion: The server took too long to respond. Please try again later or reduce the data size.
error.unsupported_format.suggestion: Only .geojson and .json file formats are supported.
error.validation.coordinates_nan: Longitude and latitude cannot be NaN
error.validation.coordinates_not_number: Longitude and latitude must be numbers
error.validation.geojson_missing_feature: FeatureCollection is missing the features array
error.validation.geojson_missing_geometr: Feature is missing the geometry field
error.validation.geojson_missing_type: GeoJSON is missing the type field
error.validation.geometry_unsupported: Unsupported geometry type: {type}. Only Polygon or MultiPolygon are supported
error.validation_error.suggestion: Please check whether the input data meets the requirements.

industry.dataIdHint: Enter the unique identifier of the dataset you uploaded so the system can recognize and reference it
industry.description: Select the industry that best matches your data characteristics, and the system will automatically recommend optimal interpolation parameters
industry.title: Select Industry Type
kriging.gridResolution.desc: Affects the detail level of the output raster. Higher values produce finer results but slower computation.
kriging.help.experience-range.suggestion: Suggested grid resolution: 80-220, number of lags: 10-18, and the nugget value is usually less than 0.3.
kriging.help.parameter-relations.suggest: It is recommended to keep nugget ≤ sill, and range should not be too large, otherwise oversmoothing may occur.
kriging.help.quick-start.suggestion: Start by selecting "Balanced Mode", upload sampling points, click "Smart Recommendation", and then make small adjustments based on the warnings.
kriging.nlags.desc: The number of distance groups used in variogram calculation
kriging.nugget.desc: Represents measurement error or microscale variation. Smaller values usually indicate a better fit.
kriging.range.desc: The distance at which the variogram reaches the sill, indicating the spatial correlation range
kriging.resolutionError: Grid resolution must be an integer greater than 0
kriging.sill.desc: The asymptotic value of the variogram, representing the total variance
kriging.title: Interpolation Parameters
